legacy.description: Claude is an AI assistant built by @anthropicai to be safe, accurate, and secure. Talk to Claude on https://t.co/ZhTwG8d1e5 or download the app.

tweets.full_text:
New from the Anthropic Economic Index: how people’s use of Claude changes with experience.

Longer-term users are more likely to iterate carefully with Claude, and less likely to hand it full autonomy. They attempt higher-value tasks, and receive more successful responses. https://t.co/yCsrA0bLt9

media.ext_alt_text: This table shows the average characteristics for high and low tenure users. We define high-tenure users as those who signed up for Claude at least six months before our data pull.
